title: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property
plain_summary: Section 420 IPC punishes cheating where a person dishonestly induces another to deliver property. Punishment can be up to 7 years imprisonment.

title: Valid Contract Requirements
plain_summary: A contract is valid only if there is free consent, lawful consideration, and lawful object.

title: Cruelty by husband or relatives
plain_summary: Husband or his relatives subjecting a woman to cruelty is punishable with up to 3 years imprisonment.

title: Consumer Rights
plain_summary: Consumers have the right to be protected against unfair trade practices and defective goods/services.
